profiles.label: CPU consumer
profiles.defaultSelectionPolicy: retained default must be decided inside this lane only
notes: Used for low-footprint fallback and safety-anchor comparisons.
Should not inherit a default from richer GPU or blind-cloud lanes.

profiles.label: 8GB-class local
profiles.defaultSelectionPolicy: default selection is constrained by residency, latency, and retained required-family coverage
notes: Primary current local default lane in this repo.
Must preserve honest resource fit instead of borrowing winners from workstation or cloud tiers.

profiles.label: 16GB-class local
profiles.roleScope: heavier local reasoning and tool loops
profiles.defaultSelectionPolicy: prefer stronger retained local completions without crossing trust-posture boundaries
notes: Intermediate local tier for stronger single-model or modest split-role setups.

profiles.label: Workstation local
profiles.defaultSelectionPolicy: promote only from retained workstation-local evidence and conformance-clean candidates
notes: Lane for larger local planners, verifiers, and richer tool loops.

profiles.label: Hybrid private
profiles.sublabel: mostly local with bounded remote help
profiles.defaultSelectionPolicy: remote help must remain explicit and bounded; promotion cannot silently widen egress
notes: Future lane for sovereign-actor-compatible bounded egress patterns.

profiles.label: Blind cloud
profiles.sublabel: remote capacity with standard blind posture
profiles.defaultSelectionPolicy: blind-cloud leaders stay shadow-scoped unless promoted inside this trust posture
notes: Visible in the scorecard and candidate surfaces, but kept separate from local defaults.

profiles.label: Blind cloud premium
profiles.defaultSelectionPolicy: same trust posture as standard blind cloud, but measured separately for higher-tier role assignment
notes: Reserved for premium remote capacity without collapsing it into standard blind-cloud decisions.
